rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when generating AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes in valid scopes without introducing new package references
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
Avoid unsafe Boolean or numeric encodings of event ports or opaque data types in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for assignments
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model
Do not convert Boolean or event port values into numeric expressions without model support
